category_sources: Official homepage says Scheme 48 is an implementation of Scheme based on a byte-code interpreter.
source_facts.description says it is a Scheme byte-code interpreter.
display_name_sources: Official homepage uses the display name Scheme 48.
docs_sources: Official development page documents how to get current development sources.
source_facts.homepage is the official Scheme 48 homepage and links the current manual.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official development page says Scheme 48 development is hosted at Codeberg at https://codeberg.org/s48/scheme48.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes Scheme 48 as a Scheme implementation.
source_facts.description identifies a Scheme byte-code interpreter.
